2026/05/15 17:14:13.489588862 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",

2026/05/15 17:14:13.489617695 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/15 17:14:13.489636023 {

2026/05/15 17:14:13.489732127 new$version <- version
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489732899 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489751577 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489752348 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489765658 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489766409 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489785077 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489785818 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489798227 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489798998 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489811417 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489812208 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/15 17:14:13.489838297 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489855724 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489867571 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489868383 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489882444 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489883235 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489897717 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489898398 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489915143 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489915864 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489930166 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489930897 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489950196 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489950907 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489964057 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489965789 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/15 17:14:13.489992950 "default"))
2026/05/15 17:14:13.490023706 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 17:14:13.490024838 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/15 17:14:13.490040161 }
2026/05/15 17:14:13.490040962 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/15 17:14:13.490056866 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/15 17:14:13.490072560 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/15 17:14:13.490114889 }

2026/05/15 17:14:13.490131278 }
2026/05/15 17:14:13.490147202 else if (length(family) == 1L) {

2026/05/15 17:14:13.490224899 }

2026/05/15 17:14:13.490319962 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
